caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a camouflage baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a room filled with clothing and framed photos. His shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". The background includes a white mannequin wearing a white garment and racks of various clothes. The walls are decorated with numerous framed photographs. Two logos appear as overlays on the screen: a circular logo featuring "T" on the left and a red text logo stating "BODILY FELONY TOT" on the right. Across the sequence, the man is talking and gesturing with his right hand, which is partially visible in the bottom-left frame. His facial expressions shift from an open-mouthed speaking posture to a slight smile with closed eyes, while the rest of the setting remains static.
